acceptanceReviewed.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/roadmap.sh rejects findings[] entries with malformed id values.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: validate_roadmap_finding_content requires lowercase UUID-shaped finding ids; negative-smoke-malformed-id.log records the expected rejection.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/roadmap.sh rejects findings[] entries with blank title or evidence values.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The checker requires non-blank title and evidence strings; negative-smoke-blank-title-evidence.log records the expected rejections.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/roadmap.sh rejects absolute or traversal findings[].path values when path is present.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The path check rejects absolute paths and '..' traversal, and negative-smoke-absolute-path.log plus negative-smoke-traversal-path.log record expected failures.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/roadmap.sh rejects non-positive or non-integer findings[].line values when line is present.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The line check accepts only positive integer values; negative-smoke-bad-line.log records the expected rejection.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/roadmap.sh rejects malformed created_at or resolved_at values and non-string optional text fields.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The timestamp and optional text checks reject malformed values; negative-smoke-bad-timestamp.log and negative-smoke-non-string-optional-text.log record expected failures.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Existing qd reports and roadmap export pass the stricter check.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-finding-content-contract/just-qd-reports-check.log records qd report validation passing with this node's completion and audit reports included.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Linux validation evidence records just qd-reports-check, nix develop -c just check, git diff --check, and temporary-copy negative smokes for malformed roadmap findings.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The evidence directory contains the requested positive validation logs and negative smoke logs for malformed finding id, content, path, line, timestamp, and optional text cases.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: No macOS-specific validation is claimed or required.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The completion report marks realWorldValidation not_required and limits the node to repository qd metadata validation.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository qd metadata validation only; Linux command evidence is recorded and no macOS-specific validation is required or claimed.
